meaning: Ulster Defence Regiment 北爱尔兰防卫团
examples: Note, however, that large objects can be passed to the UDR as arguments.
A functional index cannot be created on a UDR that returns a large object.
A functional index is created on values returned by a User Defined Routine (UDR).
Other competitors in the services sector include: Colonial Properties (CLP), Post Properties Inc (PPS), and UDR (UDR).
The SDLP's Dominic Bradley said there were deep sensitivities around the motion and that some MLAs had served in the UDR.
